column1: # Actions: IGNORE (suppress), WARN (warn but don't fail), FAIL (fail the scan)
# --- Informational / false positives in dev/CI environments ---
# 10016 - Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled
# X-XSS-Protection is intentionally absent (deprecated header, CSP is used instead)

column3: X-XSS-Protection deprecated; CSP header is used instead

column1: # API returns timestamps in responses (expected behaviour, not a vulnerability)

column3: Timestamps in JSON responses are expected behaviour

column1: # Only applicable in production with TLS; not available in CI Docker environment

column3: HSTS not set in CI test environment (HTTP only); set in production behind TLS

column1: # 10038 - Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
# API does not serve HTML; CSP is less relevant for pure JSON REST APIs

column3: REST API with no HTML output; CSP less critical but should be reviewed

column1: # 10036 - Server Leaks Version Information via "Server" HTTP Response Header Field

column3: Server header should be suppressed in production

column1: # Our SecurityHeadersMiddleware sets this; flag if actually missing

column3: X-Content-Type-Options must be set (set by SecurityHeadersMiddleware)
Persistent XSS must not be present
SQL Injection must not be present
OS command injection must not be present
Path traversal must not be present
SSI injection must not be present
